title: Toppermon
description: A Cobblemon Modpack that aims to provide a smooth experience for lovers of both the Pokémon Anime and games.
body:
A simple Cobblemon Modpack that aims to provide a smooth experience for lovers of both the Pokémon Anime and games. The Modpack can be played alone or with a group of friends.
For some Quests, multiple Players are needed. I whole-heartedly recommend to play in a group of 1-8 Players.

Features:
- Capture and train Pokémon
- Explore a beatiful world generated with Terralith
- Explore dozens of new buildings to find loot and legendary Pokémon
- Challenge NPC trainers and Gym Leaders to become the Pokémon Master
- Trade and battle with your friends (Server required)!
- Settle down and enjoy building with new decorative elements
- Quests that help Players adjust to the nature of the modpack
- Try out new foods, cook with and for your Pokémon
- Evolve your Pokémon into their Mega-Evolutions
- Search for new Pokémon by using the Minimap
- Take Pictures of your Pokémon
- Pokémon Music plays during exploration
- Pre-installed Shader
- "Endgame" activities such as shiny hunting, randomly generated gyms that scale with the players level, hunting for legendaries, breeding Pokémon and more!
 


This Modpack is intended as comfortable package that stays close to the Pokémon games and add enough content to satisfy any player for a long time.
There is also support for FTBQuests, but due to it not being on Modrinth it has to be installed manually.

<details>
<summary>Extra Mods</summary>
For full functionality you will need to manually install the following mods.
If you don't you will lose out on all the Quests but the rest of the modpack will work fine.

[FTB Quest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric)
[FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric)
[FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric)
[FTB XMod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat)
[ExtraQuests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extraquests/download/7309945)
[Cobblemon Quests](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-quests)

</details>



The Quests are still being expanded and are expected to be finshed around Dec. 20th 2025


Warning!
As Cobblemon sometimes needs to load a lot of different mobs at once when loading new chunks, I recommend giving the pack between 6 ~ 8 GB of RAM.
